product.title: One capsule. The architecture of cellular longevity.
product.description: Aeternyx™ is a clinical-grade nutraceutical that converges ten evidence-graded molecules across the five hallmarks of cellular ageing: mitochondrial decline, oxidative stress, inflammaging, vascular calcium handling, and micronutrient adequacy. Each dose is mapped to a published human RCT.

ingredientsSection.title: Ten molecules. Dosed to the trial that proved them.
ingredientsSection.subtitle: Every ingredient is dosed to mirror the human clinical trial that validated its mechanism, not the bottom of the supplement market.

items.name: Coenzyme Q10
items.description: Mitochondrial ATP synthesis cofactor. Dose aligned to Q-SYMBIO and KiSel-10 RCT protocols. Rate-limiting for cellular energy production.

items.name: Trans-Resveratrol
items.description: SIRT1 activator and modulator of NF-κB inflammaging signalling. Dose matched to Witte 2014 cognitive RCT.

items.name: Alpha-Lipoic Acid
items.description: Universal antioxidant, water and lipid soluble. Regenerates Vitamins C and E. Dose within ALADIN and SYDNEY 2 study range.

items.name: Astaxanthin
items.description: Carotenoid antioxidant. Crosses blood-brain and blood-retina barriers. Modulates NF-κB signalling. Dose at the floor of cognitive trial efficacy.

items.name: Lycopene
items.description: Lipid peroxidation chain terminator. PREDIMED dose alignment for cardiovascular support. Completes the carotenoid antioxidant spectrum with Astaxanthin.

items.name: Selenium (L-Selenomethionine)
items.description: Rate-limiting cofactor for the GPx1 to GPx5 enzymatic antioxidant cascade. KiSel-10 partner molecule. Addresses India's selenium-deficient soil gap.

items.name: Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid)
items.description: Recycles oxidised Vitamin E and glutathione. Collagen synthesis cofactor. Foundational antioxidant network anchor.

items.name: Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol)
items.description: Addresses the documented 80 percent vitamin D deficiency in urban Indian adults. Supports immune, cardiovascular, and bone function.

items.name: Vitamin K2-7 (MK-7)
items.description: Activates osteocalcin, directing calcium to bone tissue. Essential D3 partner molecule for safe long-term supplementation.

items.name: Zinc (Zinc Bisglycinate)
items.description: Antioxidant enzyme cofactor (superoxide dismutase). Supports immune function, wound healing, and testosterone maintenance. Chelated form for high bioavailability.

science.title: Five cellular ageing pathways. One convergent nutraceutical.
science.subtitle: Cellular ageing is not one process. It is the cumulative drift of mitochondria, redox balance, signalling, calcium handling, and micronutrient status. Aeternyx™ supports all five.

pathways.name: Mitochondrial Decline
pathways.detail: CoQ10 and ALA support ATP synthesis efficiency known to decline from age 30 onward.

pathways.name: Oxidative Stress
pathways.detail: Astaxanthin, Lycopene, Vitamin C, and Selenium-GPx form a layered reactive oxygen species defence.

pathways.name: Inflammaging
pathways.detail: Resveratrol-driven SIRT1 activation and NF-κB signalling modulation at the gene level.

pathways.name: Vascular Calcium Handling
pathways.detail: K2-7 partners with D3 to direct calcium toward bone tissue rather than arterial walls.

pathways.name: Micronutrient Adequacy
pathways.detail: D3, Zinc, and Selenium correct India-specific population-level deficiencies.

philosophy.quote: We did not build Aeternyx to be a supplement. We built it to be the molecular floor on which a longer life is constructed. Every dose mapped to a randomised trial, every molecule earning its place. Cellular intelligence is not a marketing phrase. It is the standard.

prescription.title: A nutraceutical your patients can take alongside their prescription.
prescription.subtitle: Aeternyx™ is built to integrate with mainstream clinical practice. No proprietary blends, no megadosing, no interactions outside the published literature. Specialists who recommend Aeternyx™ include:

posts.title: Why we dose CoQ10 at 100mg, not 30mg
posts.excerpt: The Q-SYMBIO and KiSel-10 trials defined the floor for clinical effect. Anything less is theatre.
posts.body:
Most CoQ10 supplements in the Indian market contain 30mg or less. This is not a clinical dose. It is a marketing dose.

The Q-SYMBIO trial (Mortensen et al., 2014) randomised 420 patients with chronic heart failure to 300mg of CoQ10 daily or placebo and reported a 42 percent reduction in all-cause mortality at two years. The follow-up KiSel-10 trial in healthy elderly Swedes used 200mg of CoQ10 plus 200mcg of selenium daily for four years and reported a 53 percent reduction in cardiovascular mortality.

At 100mg, Aeternyx™ sits at the floor of clinical effect: the dose at which serum CoQ10 reliably rises above the deficiency threshold in adults over 40. It is paired with 55mcg of selenium to complete the KiSel-10 synergy. Anything less is below the threshold at which the molecule does anything measurable in the literature.

posts.title: The calcium paradox: why D3 needs K2
posts.excerpt: Unaccompanied Vitamin D3 supplementation can deposit calcium where it does the most harm. K2-7 is non-negotiable.
posts.body:
Vitamin D3 raises serum calcium. That calcium has to go somewhere. In a K2-replete body, osteocalcin (a K2-dependent protein) carboxylates and routes the calcium into bone tissue, where it is wanted. In a K2-deficient body, that same calcium can drift into arterial walls, where it can become a substrate for atherosclerotic plaque calcification.

This is the calcium paradox, and it is the reason high-dose D3 supplementation without K2 has been associated with elevated coronary calcification scores in several observational cohorts.

Aeternyx™ pairs every 2000 IU of D3 with 100mcg of K2-7 (the MK-7 isoform, which has a 72-hour half-life versus MK-4's 8 hours). The molecules are not interchangeable. They are partners, and we will not ship D3 without K2.

posts.title: Astaxanthin: the only carotenoid that crosses the BBB
posts.excerpt: Why one tiny molecule from microalgae outperforms most cognitive supplements on the market.
posts.body:
Astaxanthin is the carotenoid that gives salmon and flamingos their colour. It is also the only carotenoid known to cross both the blood-brain barrier and the blood-retina barrier in measurable concentrations.

Its antioxidant capacity is approximately 6,000 times that of Vitamin C and 100 times that of Vitamin E in vitro. It also modulates NF-κB signalling and stabilises the mitochondrial inner membrane against oxidative leak.

In the cognition literature, 4 to 12mg of astaxanthin per day has been associated with improvements in working memory, reaction time, and macular pigment optical density. Aeternyx™ includes 4mg, the floor of efficacy in those trials, dosed for daily sustainable use rather than acute studies.

hero.title: We are Arata Nutraceuticals.
hero.subtitle: A physician-led longevity laboratory based in Hyderabad, building India's most clinically literate nutraceutical portfolio. Aeternyx™ is our founding formulation.

story.title: Why we exist
paragraphs: Arata Nutraceuticals was founded on a single conviction: the supplement industry in India had drifted dangerously far from the clinical literature. Bottles claimed everything, trials supported almost nothing. Doses were marketing artefacts. Excipients outweighed actives.

We work backwards from the randomised trial. Every molecule in every Arata product is included because a peer-reviewed human RCT proved it does something measurable. Every dose matches the trial that earned it. Anything that cannot survive that test is not in the capsule.
Aeternyx™ is the first of a planned portfolio of physician-formulated nutraceuticals. Each is engineered for a specific axis of healthspan, and each is held to the same standard.
